field_values.action_summary: Driven by distress, Carter abandons his post and is intercepted in an antechamber by four Zodangan guardsmen. A violent twenty-minute battle ensues, resulting in the death of all four guards.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots (choreography and spatial movement); Handheld/Dynamic tracking (combat intensity); Close-ups (impacts and weapon work)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Blood splatter patterns on walls and floor
Cumulative count of dead guards in frame
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH022_SC002

## Production Intent
Execute a high-intensity combat sequence demonstrating John Carter's physical superiority through a prolonged engagement against four Zodangan guardsmen. The choreography must transition from frantic desperation to calculated violence, concluding with the total neutralization of all threats within the palace corridors.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Four Guardsmen

## Required Environments
- zodanga_palace_interior (Antechamber/Corridors)

## Continuity Constraints
- Blood splatter patterns on walls and floor
- Weapon positions post-combat
- Cumulative count of dead guards in frame

## Beat List
- BT001: Confrontation and interception
- BT002: The violent battle
- BT003: Aftermath and exhaustion
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
